# AEGIS Forecast Drift — Historical Timeline

Governed forecast drift monitoring — **V2** snapshot (read-only).

### Purpose
Status transitions over time (`old_status` → `new_status`, `changed_at`) reconstructing the drift history for each event.

### Status
🚧 **Structural shell** created in **E7D.0**. Analytical panels will be built in **E7D.8**.

### Data source
Governed **V2** snapshot (read-only) via datasource `aegis-forecast-drift-csv` — `forecast_drift_event_history.csv`.

### Known data limitations
Governed snapshot spans a **single calculation run**, so the timeline reflects one run's transitions (**71** history rows).
